title: Declared Invariant Index
description: Schema for normalized invariant enforcement map output. Each entry maps an invariant to its enforcement evidence, verification level, blast radius, and dependent journeys.

id.description: Invariant identifier. Must start with INV- prefix.

authority_owner_entity.description: Component or layer responsible for enforcing this invariant.

verification_level.description: The highest level of verification evidence for this invariant.

source_of_truth.description: Source markdown file containing this invariant definition.

blast_radius.description: Classified blast radius using the 5-tier classifier.

journeys.description: Journey names that depend on this invariant.

code_refs.description: Code file references for enforcement locations.

test.description: Test classes that verify this invariant.

notes.description: What breaks if this invariant is violated.
